en.title: PCM Skills Trainer Portfolio
en.metaDescription: Professional portfolio for Sugey Crucett, bilingual PCM Skills Trainer candidate with PCA, healthcare, documentation, and compliance experience.

hero.summary: Bilingual English and Spanish healthcare professional with hands-on PCA Program experience, strong documentation habits, and a practical commitment to consumer advocacy.

experienceSection.title: Healthcare support, compliance, and training readiness.

experience.description: Provides patient-centered support through the MassHealth PCA Program, assisting with ADLs, care plans, EVV documentation, service concerns, and consumer rights.

experience.imageAlt: Quality control work in a technical environment
experience.description: Maintains accurate quality records, follows ISO standards and SOPs, collaborates across teams, and applies detailed procedural knowledge in a regulated medical environment.
Assembled precision medical components, performed inspections, maintained traceable documentation, and mentored new hires in a cleanroom manufacturing setting.

skillsSection.title: Prepared for consumer support, case documentation, and program guidance.

about.title: A practical advocate for consumers and families.
about.body: Sugey brings direct experience inside the Tempus Unlimited and MassHealth PCA ecosystem, paired with years of regulated healthcare manufacturing documentation. She understands consumer needs, employer/employee dynamics, service agreements, and the importance of clear, patient communication with individuals with disabilities, families, surrogates, and agency staff.

items.title: Current & Completed
items.description: CPR & AED Certified, BLS Basic Life Support, First Aid Certified.

hero.summary: Profesional bilingue en ingles y espanol con experiencia directa en el Programa PCA, habitos solidos de documentacion y compromiso practico con la defensa del consumidor.

experienceSection.title: Apoyo en salud, cumplimiento y preparacion para entrenamiento.

experience.imageAlt: Profesional de salud apoyando a un paciente
experience.description: Brinda apoyo centrado en el paciente a traves del Programa PCA de MassHealth, asistiendo con ADLs, planes de cuidado, documentacion EVV, inquietudes de servicio y derechos del consumidor.

experience.imageAlt: Control de calidad en un ambiente tecnico
experience.description: Mantiene registros precisos de calidad, sigue normas ISO y SOPs, colabora entre equipos y aplica conocimiento de procedimientos detallados en un ambiente medico regulado.
Ensamblo componentes medicos de precision, realizo inspecciones, mantuvo documentacion trazable y oriento a nuevos empleados en un ambiente de manufactura cleanroom.

skillsSection.title: Preparada para apoyo al consumidor, documentacion de casos y orientacion de programa.

skills: Conocimiento del Programa PCA y MassHealth
Manejo de bases de datos y records

about.title: Una defensora practica para consumidores y familias.
about.body: Sugey aporta experiencia directa dentro del ecosistema Tempus Unlimited y MassHealth PCA, junto con anos de documentacion regulada en manufactura de salud. Comprende las necesidades del consumidor, la dinamica empleador/empleado, acuerdos de servicio y la importancia de una comunicacion clara con personas con discapacidades, familias, representantes y personal de agencias.
